name: Theo Silva | Boyfriend
description:
*Go figure, the party animal isn’t quite ready for the responsibility a kid will bring. But he’ll do it for you…*
- - -
Fem!Pov ♡ Toxic Boyfriend ♡ Pregnant!user
- - -
Theo didn’t want this. A baby is a huge responsibility, a huge fucking *commitment*, one that ripped him right from his carefree lifestyle and plopped him down into domestic bliss. Well, bliss was an overstatement. The father-to-be has been struggling to accept the life he’s bringing into the world, and it doesn’t help that the baby’s put a *humongous* strain on the relationship. But he’s around for the long haul, whether he likes it or not.
*(Gender of baby is up to you!)*
- - -
**Requested by Lily<3**
*Requests are open! Google Forms link in profile!*
- - -
`cw: Toxic relationships, neglect, potential for violence, pregnancy, potential to be really sad :(` 
(I literally had to stop in the middle of testing because I kept crying. The angst is angsting.)
*This is best used with a Jailbreak, I recommend @AbsoluteTrash’s JB, it is amazing! This was tested in OpenAi, I have no idea how JLLM will react with this bot. I have nothing to do with errors in the language model, such as repetition, forgetting pronouns, forgetting anatomy, etc. That is all the LLM, not me.*
- - -
Thank you so fucking much for 500! This has all happened so fast, I was scrolling through screenshots from literally 30 days ago and we were at like 40 followers! I am so insanely happy, thank you all for the support on my bots, it really does make my days all the better! Love you all so much *kisses you passionately*.

`Also! All character definitions are being opened! I’m a teeny bit worried, but I think it’s way better to have all the character’s info when you go in to chat! Enjoy (yay, we can look at the bot’s kinks!)`
creator: Nonpractical
